---
title: "App.tsx"
path: "C:\Users\Craig\Corvus\CorvusStar\src\tools\pennyone\vis\App.tsx"
loc: 160
complexity: 12
logic_score: 6.25
style_score: 1.00
intel_score: 2.25
overall_score: 1.17
---

## Intent
The `App.tsx` sector implements high-complexity logic focusing on logToServer, params, token, MatrixErrorBoundary, App, App, useMatrixStore, params, t, handleError, fetchData, ts, matrixRes, mData, gData. It forms a node in the Gungnir Matrix.

## Interaction Protocol
Integrate via logToServer, params, token, MatrixErrorBoundary, App, App, useMatrixStore, params, t, handleError, fetchData, ts, matrixRes, mData, gData. Follow the Linscott Standard for this sector.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 6.3/10
- **Style [S]**: 1.0/10
- **Intel [I]**: 2.3/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 18 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [useEffect](file://react)
- [Component](file://react)
- [ReactNode](file://react)
- [Canvas](file://@react-three/fiber)
- [OrbitControls](file://@react-three/drei)
- [PerspectiveCamera](file://@react-three/drei)
- [AdaptiveDpr](file://@react-three/drei)
- [NeuralGraph](file://./components/NeuralGraph.tsx)
- [PlaybackHUD](file://./components/PlaybackHUD.tsx)
- [SelectionPanelShell](file://./components/SelectionPanelShell.tsx)
- [useMatrixStore](file://./store/useMatrixStore.js)

### Exports
- `logToServer`
- `params`
- `token`
- `MatrixErrorBoundary`
- `App`
- `App`
- `useMatrixStore`
- `params`
- `t`
- `handleError`
- `fetchData`
- `ts`
- `matrixRes`
- `mData`
- `gData`
